base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of super_mario — a character (playable) from 1988 super mario bros 3. Super Mario (mushroom) — stand/walk/run/jump/swim/duck/climb/pipe-enter + ground-pound new for SMB3. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Super Mario (mushroom) — stand/walk/run/jump/swim/duck/climb/pipe-enter + ground-pound new for SMB3
